shops.list.empty: No shops tracked yet. Paste an Etsy shop URL to get started.
seo.list.title: SEO Audit
seo.list.urlPlaceholder: Paste a listing URL to analyze its SEO...
seo.list.empty: No SEO audits yet. Paste a listing URL to analyze its SEO.
seo.detail.noSuggestions: No suggestions — your listing SEO looks great!
annotation.searchVolumeEst: Estimated monthly search volume. Calculated as listing_count × category_weight / 100, where category weight varies by Etsy category popularity.
annotation.competitionScore: Competition level (0-100). Based on review density (50%) and price dispersion (50%). Higher score means more competitive.
annotation.avgPrice: Average price of the top 50 search results for this keyword on Etsy.
annotation.listingCount: Total number of active Etsy listings matching this keyword at the time of search.
annotation.trendDirection: Trend direction over the last 3 data points: Rising (>10% increase), Falling (>10% decrease), or Stable (within ±10%).
annotation.totalListings: Total number of active listings currently in this Etsy shop.
annotation.totalReviews: Total number of reviews across all listings in this shop.
annotation.avgRating: Average star rating (1-5) across all reviewed listings in this shop.
annotation.priceRange: Price range from minimum to maximum across all listings in this shop. Includes avg (mean) and median.
annotation.overallScore: Weighted SEO score combining Title (35%), Tags (40%), and Description (25%). Maximum score is 100.
annotation.titleScore: Title quality score (0-100). Evaluates: ideal length (40-60 chars), core keyword in first 40 chars, capitalization ratio, and buyer-friendly modifier words.
annotation.tagScore: Tag quality score (0-100). Evaluates: all 13 tag slots used, multi-word longtail tags (3+), title-word alignment (8+), and hot-tag matches (3+).
annotation.descriptionScore: Description quality score (0-100). Evaluates: length (200+ chars), core keyword mentions (2-5 times), structure (bullets/line breaks), and longtail phrase usage.
